investigation_summary: Mid-range: persistent Brand Audit plastic ranking; RSPO palm yet deforestation ties; Fair & Lovely / Glow & Lovely colorism litigation and reputational record; Ben & Jerry's 2022 West Bank sales dispute + U.S. state divestment laws complexity. CDP A- climate better than packaging honesty.

profile.tax_summary: ~25–27% effective global rate in filings narrative — above many peers. Netherlands legacy structures simplified post-2020 unification.
profile.legal_summary: B&J Israel-Palestine distribution sale 2022 — legal/political crossfire. Fair & Lovely skin-lightening rebranded Glow & Lovely — continued colorism critique. PFAS personal-care suits. Greenpeace palm complaints. Plastic NGO audits.
profile.labor_summary: Tea / palm / cocoa upper-stream risks noted in NGO reports. Developed-market HQ calm.
profile.environmental_summary: Sustainable Living Plan mixed independent review. Top-quartile plastic waste brand audits. Palm RSPO + continued deforestation linkage allegations.
profile.political_summary: EU packaging / due-diligence lobbying via associations.
profile.product_health: Skin-lightening chemistry and marketing ethics. Axe phthalate debates in NGO science summaries.
profile.executive_summary: No corruption prosecution in this dossier; B&J independent board contract historically strong until geopolitical event.
